violations.text: An uncovered old fan in the ceiling above the oven has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as olives, juice, and simple syrups) in the basement refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. The 3 bay sink will be used to sanitize equipment and utensils until the dishwasher is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
Coconut milk was observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
Some drinks are prepared using raw egg whites per PIC. The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Working containers (spray bottle) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

A crate of liquor bottles observed stored on the floor beneath the handsink at the bar. Liquor bottles observed stored on the floor in the basement. Food and bottles observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor in the basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package in the basement area, with open packages. Single service observed stored on the floor, and on shelves less than 6 inches from the floor. Single service items shall be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink expired in 2024.New test strips are needed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer in the basement have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair, with pieces missing exposing the subflooring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
